plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Generic development team: backend engineer, frontend engineer, and QA/tester.

skills.description: Senior backend engineer — layered architecture, TDD-first, security-aware. Laravel/PHP primary.
Senior frontend engineer — React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind, Inertia.js.
QA engineer / TDD lead — test case definition, coverage review, framework-agnostic.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review team: offensive (red-team) and defensive (blue-team) gates.

skills.description: Adversary simulation, kill chain analysis, exploitation path modeling. Gate before every merge.
Detection engineering, audit trail completeness, IR readiness, hardening. Gate before every merge.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering roles: architect, git/CI standards, DevOps.

skills.description: Code quality, design decisions, performance, scalability review.
CI/CD, IaC, GitOps, cost optimization, infra incidents.
Git discipline, CI hygiene, commit and PR message standards.

plugins.name: aposent
plugins.description: Full squad for aposent.ai — previdenciário SaaS (Laravel + Inertia + React).

skills.description: Squad orchestrator — coordinates PM, design, backend, QA, security, legal gates.
Senior UI/UX designer — prazo-first design system, Inertia + Radix UI + Tailwind.
Product discovery and prioritization for the aposent.ai platform.
Browser-based E2E validation via Playwright on Laravel + Inertia.js stack.
Direito Previdenciário + LGPD + sigilo OAB compliance gate.
